scripts.deploy:rust-repl: bun run build:rust-repl && bun --filter rust-repl run deploy:wrangler
scripts.deploy:portfolio: bun run build:portfolio && bun --filter portfolio run deploy:wrangler
scripts.deploy:crates: bun run build:crates    && bun --filter crates    run deploy:wrangler
scripts.deploy:exposed: bun run build:exposed   && bun --filter exposed   run deploy:wrangler
